hooks.command: day=$(date +%u 2>/dev/null || powershell -Command '(Get-Date).DayOfWeek.value__' 2>/dev/null); if [ "$day" = "6" ] || [ "$day" = "7" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "SATURDAY/SUNDAY — Weekly calibration day: Before any other work, switch to Athena (Reviewer) role and run the full weekly cross-agent calibration protocol from agents/shared/prompts/calibration-prompt.md. This is mandatory."}'; fi

cd "c:/Projecten/AI Programming/ai-factory" && git diff --quiet HEAD -- agents/ projects/ shared/ config/ CLAUDE.md .gitignore .mcp.json 2>/dev/null; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then git add agents/ projects/ shared/ config/ CLAUDE.md .gitignore .mcp.json && git commit -m "auto: session sync $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" && git push origin master; fi
